content.text:
Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /workspace/YatCC/task/1/antlr/CMakeLists.txt:
     1	if(NOT antlr4-runtime_FOUND OR NOT antlr4-generator_FOUND)
     2	  message(FATAL_ERROR "未找到 ANTLR4 ！")
     3	endif()
     4	
     5	antlr4_generate(
     6	  task1-antlr # 唯一标识名
     7	  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/SYsULexer.g4 # 输入文件
     8	  LEXER # 生成类型：LEXER/PARSER/BOTH
     9	  FALSE # 是否生成 listener
    10	  FALSE # 是否生成 visitor
    11	  "" # C++ 命名空间
    12	)
    13	
    14	file(GLOB _src *.cpp *.hpp *.c *.h)
    15	add_executable(task1 ${_src} ${ANTLR4_SRC_FILES_task1-antlr})
    16	
    17	target_include_directories(task1 PRIVATE . ${ANTLR4_INCLUDE_DIR_task1-antlr})
    18	target_include_directories(task1 SYSTEM PRIVATE ${ANTLR4_INCLUDE_DIR})
    19	
    20	target_link_libraries(task1 antlr4_static)
    21
